summary:
Mandatory evaluations for opioid dependence require comprehensive documentation of substance use, comorbidities, and functioning, ensuring its presence in medical records. Methadone maintenance treatment is officially recognized and integrated into standard care pathways, leading to consistent documentation of this intervention.  

\boxed{A}
